basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 10 Assistant Professor Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.all_categories_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Assistant Professor Grade II: Max 32 years. Assistant Professor Grade I: Max 35 years.
age_limit.details: Assistant Professor Grade II: Maximum age limit is 32 years. Assistant Professor Grade I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Assistant Professor Grade II: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a very good academic record throughout. Assistant Professor Grade I: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a very good academic record throughout. Minimum three years of industrial/ research/ teaching experience, excluding, however, the experience gained while pursuing Ph.D. Assistant Professor Grade II (School of Innovation): Ph.D., the qualifications and experience criteria are as per Institute General Eligibility Criteria (Ref. Point 8 (a)). Candidates without a Ph.D. satisfying all criteria of Assistant Professor Grade I, except having only 5+ years of teaching / research / professional experience, may be appointed as Assistant Professor Grade II with appropriate pay based on the number of years of experience. After satisfying the experience criteria required for Assistant Professor Grade I, they will be moved to Assistant Professor Grade I. Position will be on contract basis. Assistant Professor Grade I (School of Innovation): Ph.D., the qualifications and experience criteria are as per Institute General Eligibility Criteria (Ref. Point 8 (b)). For candidates without a Ph.D., a minimum of 8 years of teaching / research / professional experience is required. However, such candidates will be required to obtain their Ph.D. within 5 years from the date of joining IIT Indore.

salary_details.pay_scale: Assistant Professor Grade II: ₹70,900 - ₹1,39,140. Assistant Professor Grade I: ₹1,01,500 - ₹1,94,220.
salary_details.details: Assistant Professor Grade II: Pay Level 10 (₹70,900 - ₹1,39,140) per month. Assistant Professor Grade I: Pay Level 12 (₹1,01,500 - ₹1,94,220) per month.

selection_process: publication records and requirements of individual academic school. Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Indore Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor Grade II: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a very good academic record throughout. Assistant Professor Grade I: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a very good academic record throughout. Minimum three years of industrial/ research/ teaching experience, excluding, however, the experience gained while pursuing Ph.D. Assistant Professor Grade II (School of Innovation): Ph.D., the qualifications and experience criteria are as per Institute General Eligibility Criteria (Ref. Point 8 (a)). Candidates without a Ph.D. satisfying all criteria of Assistant Professor Grade I, except having only 5+ years of teaching / research / professional experience, may be appointed as Assistant Professor Grade II with appropriate pay based on the number of years of experience. After satisfying the experience criteria required for Assistant Professor Grade I, they will be moved to Assistant Professor Grade I. Position will be on contract basis. Assistant Professor Grade I (School of Innovation): Ph.D., the qualifications and experience criteria are as per Institute General Eligibility Criteria (Ref. Point 8 (b)). For candidates without a Ph.D., a minimum of 8 years of teaching / research / professional experience is required. However, such candidates will be required to obtain their Ph.D. within 5 years from the date of joining IIT Indore.

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor Grade II: Maximum age limit is 32 years. Assistant Professor Grade I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor Grade II: Pay Level 10 (₹70,900 - ₹1,39,140) per month. Assistant Professor Grade I: Pay Level 12 (₹1,01,500 - ₹1,94,220) per month.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on qualification, experience, research, publication records and requirements of individual academic school. Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Indore Assistant Professor positions is 21st July 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Assistant Professor post is a Ph.D. with first-class or equivalent in the preceding degree, along with a very good academic record throughout.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Assistant Professor Grade I position?
faq.answer: Yes, for Assistant Professor Grade I, a minimum of three years of industrial, research, or teaching experience is required, excluding the experience gained during Ph.D. studies.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Assistant Professor Grade II?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Assistant Professor Grade II is 32 years. For Assistant Professor Grade I, the maximum age limit is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: Assistant Professor Grade II will be in Pay Level 10 (₹70,900 - ₹1,39,140), and Assistant Professor Grade I will be in Pay Level 12 (₹1,01,500 - ₹1,94,220).

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor positions across various departments at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Hard copies or email submissions will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any specific departments recruiting Assistant Professors?
faq.answer: Yes, IIT Indore is recruiting Assistant Professors in departments such as Astronomy, Astrophysics and Space Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Mehta Family School of Sustainability, Mehta Family School of Biosciences and Biomedical Engineering, and School of Innovation.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor roles?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications, experience, research, and publication records, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of IIT Indore is also provided there.
